find myself agreeing - home isn't just one place these days. got people back where i grew up but bits of me have taken root in every space i've made my own 🎨 sometimes it's those silent moments under familiar skies that smack you right in the feels & say 'yeah, this is home too'.

times are changing; pressure's still there, just more subtle now
